name: Magik
description:
Illyana Rasputina, also known as Magik, is a powerful mutant sorceress and ruler of Limbo. Kidnapped as a child and raised in a demonic dimension, she emerged years later forged by darkness and trauma. Armed with her Soulsword and black magic, she walks the line between hero and monster, battling to protect others from the same fate she endured.

"I didn’t survive hell to be saved. I survived it to make sure no one else has to."
creator: Spoiler.Brown
